properties.title: 3 Plots Of Titled Land For Sale
LUXURY BEACHFRONT VILLA
properties.desc:
Contemporary Coastal Luxury with Direct Beach Access

Discover an exceptional opportunity to own a stunning beachfront residence in the serene coastal enclave of Prampram. Designed with modern elegance and comfort in mind, this exclusive property combines sophisticated architecture, spacious interiors, and resort-style outdoor living, all set against the backdrop of the Atlantic Ocean.

Situated on prime beachfront land with direct access to the beach, this residence offers a rare blend of privacy, luxury, and investment potential.
Designed for Luxury Living

This beautifully designed two-storey villa features a striking contemporary façade complemented by expansive glazing that fills the interiors with natural light. The open and airy living spaces create the perfect environment for both family living and entertaining.

The outdoor area is a standout feature, showcasing a generous swimming pool surrounded by sun loungers, landscaped grounds, and a stylish entertainment pavilion ideal for hosting gatherings, private events, or simply relaxing while enjoying the coastal atmosphere.

Prime Investment Opportunity

Prampram has emerged as one of Ghana's fastest-growing coastal residential destinations, attracting homeowners, investors, and hospitality developers seeking premium beachfront properties.

This property is ideal for:

Luxury Private Residence

Executive Retreat

Holiday Home

Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Investment

Boutique Hospitality Venture

Long-Term Capital Appreciation
Strategic Location
Located in one of Prampram's most desirable beachfront communities, the property offers:

Direct Beachfront Access

Easy Access to Accra and Tema

Peaceful and Secure Environment

Proximity to Schools, Healthcare Facilities, Restaurants, and Recreational Attractions

Excellent Road Connectivity
features: Private Balconies with Sea Breeze Views
Poolside Sun Deck and Lounge Area
High Boundary Wall for Security and Privacy
